heading_content_part: Privacy Policy - KideoPrivacy PolicyWe at KiDEO Tech LTD (“KiDEO”, “we”, “us” and “our”) respect your privacy. This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) explains the privacy practices for the mobile application (“Application”).

heading_content_part: We use third party tools to collect analytics information about your use of the Application. We use Google analytics to collect analytic information about your use of the Application. This analytics tool collects your IP address, type of device, language use, your session duration, content you accessed on the Application, user interface clicks, frequency and scope of use of the Application.
